title: Velvety Korean Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A paleo-friendly, one-pot dish featuring candied sweet potato peel with a sweet and savory sauce.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Wrap sweet potatoes in foil and bake for about 45 minutes.
While baking, mix coconut cream with soy sauce, vinegar, ginger, sesame oil, and salt. Set aside.
After baking, peel the sweet potatoes and cut into small cubes. Place them in a blender or food processor with green onions, peanut butter (if using), and remaining ingredients from step 2.
Blend until smooth. Pour back into pot with the baked sweet potato cubes.
Simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
